title: senecio auritus
intro: Senecio auritus, also known as Woolly Senecio, is a succulent plant native to South Africa, characterized by its velvety, grey-green foliage and yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Senecio auritus include its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
